items.prompt: Mixed date formats in one column can cause:
choices: Silent parse failures and wrong time joins
items.explain: Example 5.18 lists mixed date representations as a consistency defect.

items.prompt: Splitting Male and M into separate categories is an inconsistency problem.
Give one business impact of duplicate rows beyond wrong totals.
items.rubric: Overweighted training rows, slower training, biased models.
items.sample_answer: Models overweight repeated rows during training.
